creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
(In reply to Charlie Li from comment #5)
devel/py-setuptools-scm@py39 fails to build in poudriere right now.

AttributeError: 'PathDistribution' object has no attribute '_normalized_name'

It fails with py-setuptools 1.63.0 and py-project_hooks 1.1.0_1 or 1.2.0 (py-project_hooks 1.1.0 works) which is why mentioning py-project_hooks is not completely irrelevant.

Newer py-setuptools (like the pending 75.1.0) will help, but as most people here likely already know, it has been roadblocked for a while.
